command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/etf-vol-risk-rotation-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,GLD,SLV,XLF,XLK,XLE,XLV --start 2021-01-04 --end 2025-12-15 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db <temporary-sqlite-db>

costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI has no cost/slippage parameter; qfa metrics are pre-cost. Ex-post turnover haircut assumes 5 bps one-way cost/slippage on daily one-way turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used

db.note: Each qfa run used a temporary SQLite DB that was deleted after JSON capture.

decision.rationale: Rejected: median random-window Sharpe and/or approximate cost-adjusted Sharpe failed acceptance threshold.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained latest.json curves
